headline: Nucor Invites You to Join Its Second Quarter of 2026 Conference Call on the Web
summary: In conjunction with Nucor's (NYSE: NUE) second quarter earnings release, you are invited to listen to its live conference call with host Leon Topalian, Nucor's Chair and Chief Executive Officer. This conference call will include a review of Nucor's results for the second quarter ended July 4, 2026, followed by a question-and-answer session. The event will be available on the internet on July 28, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time.
